mlb.headline: Jose Siri's walk-off single lifts Angels to 3-2 win over Astros in 10 innings
mlb.summary: — Jose Siri hit a game-winning single in the 10th inning, Mike Trout and Logan O’Hoppe homered, and the Los Angeles Angels beat the Houston Astros 3-2 on Wednesday night.

mlb.headline: 2026 MLB ABS challenge system tracker: Team, player rankings
mlb.summary: The ABS challenge system leaderboard ranks batters, catchers, teams and umpires throughout the MLB season.

mlb.headline: Houston Astros vs. Los Angeles Angels: Game Highlights
mlb.summary: Houston Astros vs. Los Angeles Angels: Game Highlights

mlb.headline: Milwaukee Brewers vs. Athletics: Game Highlights
mlb.summary: Milwaukee Brewers vs. Athletics: Game Highlights

mlb.headline: Díaz and Burger lead the Rangers to a 6-4 win over the Royals in 10 innings
mlb.summary: — Elias Díaz hit a go-ahead double in the 10th inning as the Texas Rangers defeated the Kansas City Royals 6-4 on Wednesday night.

mlb.headline: Cortes and Butler homer to rally A's to 4-3 win over the Brewers
mlb.summary: — Carlos Cortes and Lawrence Butler hit towering home runs in the seventh inning to rally the Athletics to a 4-3 victory over the Milwaukee Brewers on Wednesday night and win the series.

nhl.headline: Holland: Laviolette hire intended to bolster Kings' offense
nhl.summary: Kings general manager Ken Holland confirmed the addition of the well-traveled Peter Laviolette is intended to kick-start Los Angeles' lagging offense.

nhl.headline: Fleet re-sign Tapani in Phase 3 of PWHL expansion process
nhl.summary: Susanna Tapani is staying put in Boston, and the Seattle Torrent re-signed forward Julia Gosling in opening the next phase of the PWHL's expansion process on Wednesday.

nhl.headline: Stanley Cup odds: Hurricanes favored to win championship after Game 4 win
nhl.summary: With the series tied 2-2, the Carolina Hurricanes are currently favored to win the Stanley Cup.

nhl.headline: Why Stephen A. loves all the offense in the Stanley Cup Final
nhl.summary: Why Stephen A. loves all the offense in the Stanley Cup Final

nhl.headline: Ex-NHL player Pascal Rheaume named coach of PWHL's Sceptres
nhl.summary: Former NHL player Pascal Rheaume was named coach of the Toronto Sceptres on Wednesday, becoming the second member of his family to join the PWHL this spring.

nhl.headline: Kevin Weekes raves about Jordan Staal, Hurricanes after Game 4 win
nhl.summary: Kevin Weekes raves about Jordan Staal, Hurricanes after Game 4 win

nba.headline: Wemby tries to make sense of Spurs' 29-point collapse
nba.summary: Wemby tries to make sense of Spurs' 29-point collapse

nba.headline: Knicks' historic Game 4 comeback: The numbers and social media reaction
nba.summary: The Knicks erased a historic halftime deficit and moved closer to their first NBA championship in decades.

nba.headline: Instant classic! Knicks erase 29-point deficit to stun Spurs in Game 4
nba.summary: Instant classic! Knicks erase 29-point deficit to stun Spurs in Game 4

nba.headline: 2026 NBA Finals: Biggest takeaways from Knicks-Spurs Game 4

nba.headline: Knicks on brink of title after historic comeback vs. Spurs

wnba.headline: Nneka Ogwumike scores 24 points against her former team to help the Sparks beat the Storm
wnba.summary: — Nneka Ogwumike scored a season-high 24 points against her former team, Kelsey Plum added 19 points and 11 assists, and the Los Angeles Sparks beat the Seattle Storm 88-83 on Wednesday night.

wnba.summary: — Brittney Sykes matched her career high with 38 points and the expansion Toronto Tempo rallied to beat the Connecticut Sun 106-102 in overtime Wednesday night in Commissioner’s Cup play.

wnba.headline: Veronica Burton scores 25 points, dishes out 8 assists as Valkyries hold off Mercury for 87-81 win
wnba.summary: — Veronica Burton scored 19 of her 25 points in the first half as Golden State quickly built a big lead and also dished out eight assists, Gabby Williams added 25 points, and the Valkyries held off the Phoenix Mercury for an 87-81 win Tuesday night.

wnba.headline: Dream's Reese outduels Cardoso, prevails in Chicago return
wnba.summary: Angel Reese had 17 points and 17 rebounds, outdueling former teammate Kamilla Cardoso to lead the Dream to an 82-75 win over the Sky on Tuesday in Reese's return to Wintrust Arena.

wnba.headline: Rookie Olivia Miles scores 24 and the Lynx cruise past the Wings 100-76 for 8th straight win
wnba.summary: — Rookie Olivia Miles had 24 points, seven rebounds and six assists, Kayla McBride added 22 points, and the Minnesota Lynx used a big first half to cruise past the Dallas Wings...

ncaab.headline: MCWS 2026: College baseball has become a perfect parity showcase
ncaab.summary: With a whole new set of teams competing in the MCWS yet again, nothing needs to change in college baseball.

ncaab.headline: Jim Schlossnagle reassures his preseason promise, previews Texas' CWS path
ncaab.summary: Schlossnagle recaps how he celebrated the Super Regional win and agrees to grow out a mustache if the Longhorns are able to bring home a College World Series championship.

ncaab.headline: Matt Scott details why Georgia has what it takes to get it done in CWS
ncaab.summary: Scott describes how he is using his CWS experience from Stanford to help the Bulldogs as they square up against Texas for the first time this season and prepare for a title run.

ncaab.headline: Highlight: Oklahoma clobbers No. 15 Kansas to punch CWS ticket
ncaab.summary: The Sooners build an 8-1 lead before the delay and maintain control throughout the rest of Game 2 as they defeat the Jayhawks, 13-2, to earn a trip to Omaha.

ncaab.headline: Highlight: Alabama advances to first CWS since 1999 with win vs. St. John's
ncaab.summary: Jason Torres blasts a grand slam in the seventh inning to break the game open as the pitching duo of Zane Adams and Matthew Heiberger combine for 10 strikeouts in the Tide's 7-2 win.

ncaab.headline: Mike Bianco describes Ole Miss' postseason run, calls them 'a bus team'
ncaab.summary: Bianco joins The Paul Finebaum Show and explains the similarities between the 2020 championship team and the current Rebels' squad before previewing their CWS mindset.

tennis.headline: Roger Federer to take part in US Open exhibition event
tennis.summary: Roger Federer will play in an exhibition at the US Open this year, returning to the Grand Slam tournament that he is the only player to win five consecutive times.

tennis.headline: Zverev wins his first Grand Slam title in five-set thriller
tennis.summary: Alexander Zverev defeats Flavio Cobolli in the 2026 Roland-Garros men's final to claim his maiden Grand Slam championship.

tennis.headline: Alexander Zverev reflects after winning French Open

tennis.headline: French Open: How Alexander Zverev finally won a major title
tennis.summary: Facing a wide-open field, Zverev captured his first Grand Slam title -- something he might have doubted would ever happen.

tennis.headline: Alexander Zverev wins French Open, finally claims 1st Grand Slam title
tennis.summary: Alexander Zverev beat Flavio Cobolli 6-1, 4-6, 6-4, 6-7 (5), 6-1 to win the French Open title.

tennis.headline: French Open 2026: How to watch in the UK, schedule, prize money, Brit watch
tennis.summary: Find out all you need to know about the 2026 French Open in the UK, with dates, TV information, prize money and more.

f1.headline: F1 agree change to controversial engine rules after drivers' complaints
f1.summary: Formula One's rule makers have agreed to two stages of regulation changes over the next two seasons to address drivers' complaints about the power units introduced this year.

f1.headline: Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix 2026: Race start time, how to watch, full schedule, predictions
f1.summary: Formula 1 heads to Spain for the Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix and Mercedes' Kimi Antonelli remains the driver to beat.

f1.headline: Lewis Hamilton praises 'supportive' Kim Kardashian after Monaco GP podium
f1.summary: Lewis Hamilton has praised his partner Kim Kardashian for her "support" after she appeared in the Formula 1 paddock for the first time at the Monaco Grand Prix.

f1.headline: Mercedes and Ferrari to receive ADUO, Red Bull has best engine - sources
f1.summary: Both Ferrari and Mercedes look set for additional engine upgrades this season and next after Red Bull's engine was judged to be the best by the FIA.

f1.headline: Mercedes boss Toto Wolff: 'Always mixed feelings' after Monaco GP podium celebrations
f1.summary: Mercedes boss Toto Wolff made a last-minute decision to join race winner Kimi Antonelli on the Monaco Grand Prix podium, but admitted he stood there with "mixed feelings" following George Russell's disastrous race.

f1.headline: Lewis Hamilton on 'happier' year with Ferrari: 'Have to remind people who I am'
f1.summary: Lewis Hamilton said he "feels like I'm having to remind people who I am" after scoring his second podium in as many races at Sunday's Monaco Grand Prix.

football.headline: Hurts: Nothing can take away what Eagles, Brown accomplished
football.summary: Eagles quarterback Jalen Hurts addressed the A.J. Brown trade for the first time since it became official Wednesday, briefly focusing on what they achieved during their four years together before spinning things forward.

football.headline: 2026 NFL minicamp live updates: Jordan Love shows off big arm
football.summary: Week 2 of OTAs is underway with 17 teams, and ESPN's NFL Nation shares news and insights from every practice.

football.headline: Lamar Jackson touts new Ravens offense under OC Declan Doyle
football.summary: After the Ravens wrapped up their minicamp Wednesday, Lamar Jackson expressed excitement over the future of the new offense under coordinator Declan Doyle. "I feel like there's going to be a lot of explosiveness this year," the QB said.

football.headline: Cardinals rookie DL Proctor tears meniscus, season in doubt
football.summary: Cardinals rookie defensive lineman Kaleb Proctor tore a meniscus during OTAs and will miss "quite a bit of time," coach Mike LaFleur said Wednesday.

football.headline: Highest-paid NFL players: Most guaranteed money at every position
football.summary: We have seen a fair share of massive contracts in the NFL. So who tops the highest-paid list at every position as of today?

football.headline: QB Deshaun Watson eager to start again for Browns after injury
football.summary: Browns QB Deshaun Watson spoke to reporters Wednesday after Cleveland's second day of mandatory minicamp, marking his first comments since he ruptured his right Achilles tendon on Oct. 20, 2024.
